lines.name: Ising Opening
lines.description: Open on the center meta-board with a middle-side cell (not the mini-center). Sends your opponent to the corresponding edge meta while you avoid an immediate C:C shootout.

lines.name: Ising Opening, Center Variation
lines.description: Same center-edge idea as Ising, then reply on the meta you receive by taking its center—locking early structure around crossing centers.

lines.name: Center Gambit
lines.description: Commit to the center cell on different meta-boards (edges and corners). Each line stakes the global center column or diagonal lanes early.

lines.name: Fortress Opening
lines.description: Same-type corner on a corner meta twice in a row (e.g. top-right meta, top-right cell twice). Stacks pressure in one wedge.

lines.name: Edge Game
lines.description: Mirror middle-edge on its matching edge meta (top meta, top middle cell, etc.). Keeps play on the outer ring before diving inward.

lines.name: Center Game
lines.description: The classic deepest start: center of the center mini-board. Sends the fight straight into the global middle.

lines.name: Fortress Opening, Center Variation
lines.description: Fortress stacking into the inherited meta’s center—corner wedge then stabilize with the local center.

lines.name: Corner Game
lines.description: Open from the center meta into one of the four corners—fast access to diagonal corner fights.

lines.name: Corner Game, Center Gambit
lines.description: Corner send from C, then take the center on the corner meta you land on.

lines.name: Corner Game, Fortress Variation
lines.description: From C into a corner, then stack the same corner type on that meta (Fortress reply).

lines.name: Edge Game, Opposing Variation
lines.description: Edge mirror first, then play the opposite edge on that mini-board—swaps axis while staying on the rim.

lines.name: Diagonal Opening
lines.description: Corner meta, opposite corner cell—cuts across the diagonal of that board.

lines.name: Diagonal Opening, Corner Gambit
lines.description: Diagonal slash on one corner meta, answered with the crossing diagonal on the meta you receive—maximum early diagonal tension.
